extraction.one_line_summary: MATAMORIC Jan attacked on the cobblestone climb to Cuenca's castle with ~5km to go, dropped fellow breakaway riders, won solo on descent.
tactical_patterns: Team Sky received minimal peloton support despite controlling duties, suggesting rivals conserving energy after stage 6 hardship.
Matamoric attacked on cobblestones while ROJA and SENNI watched each other, exploiting tactical standoff between marked rivals.
Dimension Data losing two riders to crashes reduced to four total, severely compromising team's stage race capabilities.

rider_signals.MATAMORIC Jan: positive: 22-year-old showed veteran tactical awareness timing attack when rivals marked each other, excelled on technical descent
rider_signals.POLYANSKY Pawel: neutral: second place two consecutive stages suggests strong form but inability to win from breakaways
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: neutral: made 14-rider break but lacked punch on cobbled finish climb
rider_signals.ROJAS Jose Joaquin: negative: allowed himself to be distracted marking SENNI instead of covering decisive Matamoric move
rider_signals.SENNI Enrico: negative: same tactical error as Rojas, let winner escape while focusing on mutual surveillance
